isProtocolAutoPaused().details: [Fix audit #28 INFO-7] Uses the hysteresis threshold: RESET if         auto-pause is currently sticky, MIN otherwise.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

syncCircuitBreaker().details: Because Solidity/EVM rolls back state mutations on `revert`, the flag         cannot be persisted inside `_purchase` itself. This external entry point         lets keepers/users commit the flag change in a successful tx.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

autoPausedOnce().notice: [Fix audit #28 INFO-7] Sticky auto-pause flag for hysteresis.

isProtocolAutoPaused().notice: Returns true if LUMINA price is below the safety threshold for new policies.

purchasePolicy(bytes32,uint256,bytes32).notice: Buy a policy directly. User pays premium in USDC.

purchasePolicyFor(bytes32,uint256,bytes3.notice: Buy a policy on behalf of another address. For API/relayer use.

quotePremium(bytes32,uint256).notice: Calculate premium for a given product and coverage.

recoverToken(address,uint256,address).notice: Recover non-USDC ERC-20 tokens sent to this contract by mistake.

submitTrigger(bytes32,uint256,bytes).notice: Submit a trigger proof. Anyone can call (permissionless).

syncCircuitBreaker().notice: [Fix audit #28 INFO-7] Synchronise the sticky auto-pause flag with         current LUMINA price. Anyone can call — does not revert, only updates         state and emits events. Intended to be called by keepers or any caller         that wants to make the hysteresis flag reflect current price.
